summary: Comprehensive testing of Partner Subscriptions new features: auto-calc Next Billing Date/Expiry Date, ISO currency dropdown, Expiry Date column in table, Stripe Customer Portal button. All 18 backend tests PASS. Frontend mostly PASS with 1 bug found in NBD manual preservation logic.

ui_bugs.issue: When user manually edits Next Billing Date (causing 'auto' badge to disappear), then changes Billing Interval → the manually-entered NBD is OVERWRITTEN by auto-calc. The requirement states 'manual value preserved when interval changes'. Root cause: line 298 calls `setNbtManual(false)` in the Billing Interval onChange handler before setting the new value, causing the useEffect to recalculate and overwrite.
ui_bugs.selector: PartnerSubscriptionsTab.tsx line 298: onValueChange={v => { setNbtManual(false); set("billing_interval", v); }}
ui_bugs.fix: Remove `setNbtManual(false)` from the billing interval Select's onValueChange. Only reset nbtManual on start_date change (which already correctly resets both flags). The billing interval change should NOT reset the manual flag.

verified_features.nbd_manual_badge_disappears: PASS - Manually editing NBD field causes 'auto' badge to disappear
verified_features.nbd_manual_preserved_on_interval_change: FAIL - BUG: Manually-entered NBD is overwritten when billing interval changes
verified_features.expiry_auto_term_months_12: PASS - Term months=12 + start_date=2026-04-01 → Expiry Date auto-set to 2027-04-01 with 'auto' badge
verified_features.expiry_auto_badge_disappears_on_manual: PASS - Manually editing Expiry Date removes the 'auto' badge
verified_features.my_subscriptions_tab: PASS - Partner admin My Subscriptions tab loads correctly
verified_features.manage_payment_method_button: PASS - open-billing-portal-btn present with CreditCard icon and 'Manage Payment Method' text
verified_features.billing_portal_redirect: PASS - Clicking button calls /api/partner/billing-portal and redirects to Stripe Customer Portal (https://billing.stripe.com/p/session/...)
verified_features.billing_portal_stripe_working: PASS - Stripe Customer Portal is actually configured and working in test environment (not mocked)

backend_verified.currency_iso_stored: PASS - GBP, USD, EUR all stored correctly

action_items: BUG FIX REQUIRED: Remove `setNbtManual(false)` from Billing Interval Select's onValueChange in PartnerSubscriptionsTab.tsx line 298. Change `onValueChange={v => { setNbtManual(false); set("billing_interval", v); }}` to `onValueChange={v => { set("billing_interval", v); }}`. This preserves manual NBD when user changes interval.
critical_code_review_comments: PartnerSubscriptionsTab.tsx line 298: `setNbtManual(false)` is called when billing interval changes, which resets the auto-calc mode and causes the useEffect to overwrite any manually-entered NBD value. The requirement says 'manual value preserved when interval changes'. Fix: don't call setNbtManual(false) on interval change.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 flows verified - NBD manual preservation fails)

seed_data_creation: Created during backend tests: TEST_ITER158 subscriptions with expiry dates (3 subs: 1 with 12-month term, 2 with USD/EUR currencies for 'Apex Holding' partner).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Subscriptions new features tested. 18 backend tests all PASS. Frontend mostly PASS. 1 bug found: manual NBD overwritten when billing interval changes. Location: PartnerSubscriptionsTab.tsx line 298. Fix is removing setNbtManual(false) from billing interval onChange. Stripe Customer Portal is fully configured in test environment and works (redirects to https://billing.stripe.com/). Scheduler advance_billing_date is correct. All other auto-calc features (monthly/quarterly/annual NBD, Expiry Date from term_months) work correctly.

rca_of_issue.bug: Manual NBD value overwritten when billing interval changes
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Line 298 of PartnerSubscriptionsTab.tsx calls setNbtManual(false) when billing interval changes. This resets the 'isManual' flag to false, causing the useEffect (which depends on [form.start_date, form.billing_interval]) to re-execute and recalculate the NBD, overwriting the manually-entered value.
reproduction_steps: 2. Set Start Date to 2026-04-01 (NBD auto-sets to 2026-05-01)
3. Manually edit Next Billing Date to 2027-06-01 (auto badge disappears)
4. Change Billing Interval from monthly to quarterly
5. Observe: NBD is recalculated to 2026-07-01 instead of staying at 2027-06-01
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Remove `setNbtManual(false)` from the Billing Interval Select's onValueChange handler. The nbtManual flag should only be reset when start_date changes (already done on line 312) - not when billing interval changes.
